title: The Public Examinations (Prevention of Unfair Means) Act, 2024
full_text: The Public Examinations (Prevention of Unfair Means) Act, 2024 लोक परीक्षा (अनुचित साधन निवारण) अधिनियम, 2024 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 2024-1 Act Number: 1 Enactment Date: 2024-02-12 Act Year: 2024 Short Title: The Public Examinations (Prevention of Unfair Means) Act, 2024 Hindi Title: लोक परीक्षा (अनुचित साधन निवारण) अधिनियम, 2024 Long Title: An Act to prevent unfair means in the public examinations and to provide for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances and Pensions Department: Department of Personnel and Training Enforcement Date: 21-06-2024 Schedule 1. THE FIRST SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Public Examinations (Prevention of Unfair Means) Act, 2024 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II UNFAIR MEANS AND OFFENCES CHAPTER III PUNISHMENT FOR OFFENCES CHAPTER IV PUNISHMENT FOR OFFENCES CHAPTER V MISCELLANEOUS CHAPTER VI AMENDMENT TO THE CRIMINAL LAW (AMENDMENT) ORDINANCE, 1944 Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Unfair means. Section 4. Conspiracy for unfair means. Section 5. Disruption to conduct public examination. Section 6. Other offences. Section 7. No premises other than examination centre shall be used for public examination. Section 8. Offences in respect of service providers and other persons. Section 9. Cognizable offences. Section 10. Punishment for offences under this Act. Section 11. Organised crimes. Section 12. Officers empowered to investigate. Section 13. Members, officers and employees of public examination authority to be public servants. Section 14. Protection of action taken in good faith by any public servant. Section 15. Provisions of this Act to be in addition to other laws. Section 16. Power to make rules. Section 17. Laying of rules. Section 18. Power to remove difficulties. Section 19. Amendment of Ordinance 38 of 1944. Schedule 1.
